examples.text: وَعَلَى الَّذِينَ هَادُوا حَرَّمْنَا كُلَّ ذِي ظُفُرٍ
examples.english: We forbade every animal with undivided hoofs

senses.gloss: to triumph over, to win, to superate
to win, to gain, to receive

examples.english: Patience is victory (literally: he who is patient, wins.)

senses.gloss: to make victorious; to grant victory; to aid

etymology.text: From Proto-Semitic *θ̣upr-, *θ̣ipr- (“nail, claw”). Cognate with Akkadian 𒌢 (ṣuprum) and Biblical Hebrew צִפֹּרֶן (ṣippórɛn).
